name: Crispy Fried Noodles
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Vegetable oil, for deep frying
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil to very hot.
2. Drop a handful of uncooked noodles into the hot oil. They will immediately puff up to several times their size.
3. Turn the noodles over and quickly fry the other side. The entire process only takes a few seconds.
4. Do not let the noodles brown.
5. Drain on paper towels.
6. Make the SYRUP by combining water, tamarind water (lime juice), and sugar in a small pot. Cook over medium heat until it thickens.
7. Prepare the SEASONINGS by heating 1 tbsp vegetable oil in a wok or skillet. Add onions and garlic and stir-fry until lightly browned.
8. Add tomato paste and soy sauce and stir-fry for another 3 minutes.
9. Clean bean sprouts and remove roots if desired.
10. Place noodles in a large bowl and pour the SYRUP and SEASONINGS mixture over them at once, mixing thoroughly with hands.
11. Add bean sprouts, cilantro, and green onions and mix again, being careful not to break the noodles into too small pieces.
12. Sprinkle with red pepper flakes if desired and serve with lemon wedges.
